CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-22-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION
Off Calendar Jul-06-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert F. Knox for defendant and moving party: KNK Builders, Inc.
Brian Kabateck (Telephonic Appearance) for plaintiff and opposing party: Las Casitas 17th Street Owners' Association

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted with modification: Defendant KNK Builders Inc.'s motion to compel the attendance of the person most knowledgeable and production of documents is granted. The deposition of the person or persons most knowledgeable shall be scheduled at a mutually convenient time and is to be completed by July 27, 2005. The Court finds that counsel for plaintiff failed to make a reasonable and good faith effort to informally resolve the matters in dispute and made an evasive response to discovery as indicated in the opposition to the instant motion. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1236.30 are to be paid by the law firm of Kabateck and Garris and the Miller Law Firm by July 27, 2005.
Modification: Deposition is to be completed on or before August 1, 2005. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
